You'll design agent "brains" using ReAct reasoning loops and learn to generate training data using a "Teacher-Student" workflow. Finally, you'll tackle advanced AI alignment, learning to prevent "specification gaming" and use Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to teach agents complex human preferences.
